title: Lovely fresh scent
text: This spray smells really good, feels lightweight, and gives my hair the beachy texture I wanted without feeling stiff.

title: Good texture but a bit drying
text: It gives solid texture and volume, but on my dry hair I needed extra conditioner after using it.

title: Perfect for curls
text: My curls stayed defined all day and the coconut scent was soft. It works well for frizz control without crunch.

title: Moisturizing curl cream
text: This cream is rich and hydrating. It is best for curly hair that needs moisture more than extra volume.

title: Great for sensitive scalps
text: I wanted something unscented and gentle. This leave-in feels light and does not irritate my scalp.

title: Fine but not very hydrating
text: The formula is clean and unscented, but it did not moisturize my thick hair enough.

title: Quick refresh
text: This dry shampoo is great when I need a fast refresh. It adds volume and has a bright citrus scent.

title: Too powdery for me
text: It refreshed my roots, but the powdery feel was too strong and I did not like the residue.
